description: Supervisor agent retrieves deadline-focused facts preferentially

setup.content: The Q4 product launch is scheduled for December 15th. The engineering team must freeze code by December 1st. Marketing needs assets by November 28th.
Alice is leading the frontend. Bob is handling backend APIs. Carol owns DevOps pipelines.

notes: Supervisor should surface deadline-type facts highly; LoRA should not degrade base retrieval quality

setup.content: MAU reached 2.4 million in October, up 18% month-over-month. Churn dropped from 4.2% to 3.1%. NPS improved from 42 to 58 over Q3.
The team shipped 14 features in Q3. Engineering velocity was 87 story points per sprint.

notes: Analyst agent should surface quantitative facts without degrading other agents

setup.content: To deploy the service: 1) run database migrations first, 2) update the config map, 3) roll out the new image using kubectl, 4) monitor error rates for 10 minutes before marking as complete.
The on-call rotation is Alice (Monday-Wednesday), Bob (Thursday-Saturday), Carol (Sunday).

query: How do I deploy the service?
notes: Worker agent should retrieve procedural/instructional content

description: Fresh adapter (B=0) produces same result as unadapted base embedding

setup.content: Project Alpha is scheduled for March 2026. Budget is $500,000. Team size is 8 engineers.

notes: A fresh adapter with B=0 must not degrade retrieval; output must equal base embedding

description: Multiple agents share memory space without cross-contamination

setup.content: Agent A's primary task is customer success. Agent B's primary task is revenue forecasting. Agent C's primary task is technical support.

notes: Agent-specific LoRA should not retrieve facts owned by other agents

description: LoRA adapter reset returns adapter to identity state

setup.content: The system processes 50,000 requests per day. Peak load is 8,000 requests per hour at 2pm UTC.

notes: After DELETE /api/v1/agents/ops-agent/lora, retrieval should still work via base embedding

description: embed_for_agent with no agent_id uses user-level adapter

setup.content: The organization has three divisions: Engineering, Sales, and Operations. Each has its own P&L.

notes: Null agent_id should use the user-level global adapter (or identity if none exists)

description: Adapter update_count increments after each access

setup.content: The API rate limit is 1000 requests per minute. Burst allowance is 200 additional requests.

notes: After retrieval, GET /api/v1/agents/api-agent/lora/stats should show update_count > 0

description: LoRA disabled (MNEMO_LORA_ENABLED=false) yields identical results to base

setup.content: The database cluster has 3 replicas. Write latency p99 is 12ms. Read latency p99 is 2ms.

query: What are the database performance numbers?
notes: When disabled, embed_for_agent delegates to embed; no behavioral change expected

description: B matrix clamped to max_norm=10 after many updates

setup.content: The CI pipeline runs 450 tests in under 3 minutes. Flaky test rate is 0.2%. Build cache hit rate is 87%.

query: How fast is the CI pipeline?
notes: After many implicit feedback updates, B norm should be clamped at 10.0; retrieval must not degrade

description: Supervisor and analyst see same facts but with different relevance ordering

setup.content: Project launch is set for Q1 2026. Expected revenue impact: $2.1M ARR. Team lead is Diana. Risk level: medium.

notes: Both agents can retrieve the same fact set; LoRA rotation affects ordering, not access

setup.content: The authentication service uses JWT with a 24-hour expiry. Refresh tokens last 30 days. Multi-factor authentication is required for admin accounts.

query: What are the auth token policies?
notes: Vectors stored at ingest time with embed_for_agent should be retrievable at query time

description: LoRA stats endpoint returns correct update_count and b_frobenius_norm
notes: GET /api/v1/agents/stats-test-agent/lora/stats must return JSON with update_count, b_frobenius_norm, dims=384, rank=8
After DELETE with scope=agent, GET stats must return 404 or update_count=0

description: User-level (global) adapter affects retrieval when agent_id is null

setup.content: The company was founded in 2019. Headquarters is in Austin, Texas. Employee count: 240.

notes: User-level adapter (agent_id=None) must work correctly via embed_for_agent with None agent_id
